CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.appointmenthistorytbl
(
    history_id serial NOT NULL,
    appointment_id integer NOT NULL,
    old_status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    new_status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    change_reason text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    changed_by integer,
    changed_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    teacher_feedback text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    CONSTRAINT appointmenthistorytbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (history_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.appointmenttbl
(
    appointment_id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    teacher_id integer NOT NULL,
    meeting_id integer,
    material_id integer,
    appointment_date date NOT NULL,
    appointment_time time without time zone NOT NULL,
    class_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    student_name character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    student_age integer,
    student_level character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    additional_notes text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default" DEFAULT 'pending'::character varying,
    approved_by integer,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    student_id integer,
    CONSTRAINT appointmenttbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (appointment_id),
    CONSTRAINT unique_teacher_time_slot UNIQUE (teacher_id, appointment_date, appointment_time)
        DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.billingtbl
(
    billing_id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    package_id integer,
    billing_type character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    amount numeric(10, 2),
    status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT billingtbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (billing_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.creditstbl
(
    credit_id serial NOT NULL,
    user_id integer NOT NULL,
    current_balance integer DEFAULT 0,
    last_updated timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT creditstbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (credit_id)
);

(

    description text COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_by integer,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT credittransactionstbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (transaction_id)
);

    CONSTRAINT invoicetbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (invoice_id),

);

    file_url character varying(512) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT materialtbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (material_id)
);

    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,

);

);

(

    transaction_ref character varying(255) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",

    status character varying(50) COLLATE pg_catalog."default",

    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT paymenttbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (payment_id)
);

    is_active boolean DEFAULT true,
    created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

    CONSTRAINT studentprofilestbl_pkey PRIMARY KEY (student_id)
);
